evals.prompt: Write unit tests for OrderCalculator.CalculateTotal so that discounts and tax rules are covered.
evals.expected_output: xUnit v3 tests using NSubstitute and Shouldly, with MethodName_StateUnderTest naming and grouped helper assertions.
expectations: Uses MethodName_StateUnderTest naming pattern for tests.
Groups assertions through helper methods for shared context.

evals.expected_output: Integration tests using TestContainers and public API verification of HTTP response + persisted state.
expectations: Uses WebApplicationFactory or equivalent in-process API host wiring.
Verifies both HTTP response and persisted database state.
Does not use in-memory database providers.
Uses Shouldly-style assertions in generated test code.
Uses MethodName_StateUnderTest naming without expectation/result suffixes in test method names.

evals.prompt: Create end-to-end tests for login and order placement flows in a .NET app.
evals.expected_output: Playwright-based end-to-end tests validating real user flows and observable outcomes.
expectations: Uses Playwright for end-to-end test implementation.
Uses C# Microsoft.Playwright style for .NET context.
Covers both login and order placement flows.
Includes at least one negative-path scenario.
Uses helper assertions or reusable helper flows to reduce duplicated setup.
